mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(a.id) checkOnWorkNum FROM check_work a WHERE date_format(a.check_date, '%Y-%m') = date_format(now(), '%Y-%m') AND a.state = '1' AND a.create_id = #{userId}
AND a.tenant_id = #{tenantId}

SELECT COUNT(a.id) diskCloudFileNum FROM file_catelog_papers a WHERE a.create_id = #{userId}
AND a.tenant_id = #{tenantId}

SELECT COUNT(a.id) forumNum FROM forum_content a WHERE a.create_id = #{userId}
AND a.tenant_id = #{tenantId}
